notes: Polishes the v4.3.191 Option 1 visual foundation to better match the approved modern earthy sample without narrowing the app to mushrooms only.
Replaces bright symbol-style sidebar/dashboard icons with warmer thin line SVG icons closer to the sample treatment.
Softens the typography by reducing heavy weights and tightening the large home title less aggressively.
Restores subtle organic texture using leaf/forest and paper-fiber SVG background layers instead of crossed-line or box-like texture patterns.
No species records, source data, image fields, edible statuses, toxicity statuses, medicinal action logic, Other Uses logic, Needs Review logic, or map features changed.
